name: Dolce Aesthetics
description: A boutique injectable studio in the heart of Scottsdale, where every Botox, filler, and lip treatment is placed by hand with an artist's eye for natural, camera-ready results.

hero.title: Artistry in every injection.
hero.subtitle: Scottsdale's boutique aesthetic studio, trusted for precise, natural-looking Botox, filler, and injectable treatments.

contact.address: 7600 E Camelback Rd Ste 9, Scottsdale, AZ 85251, United States

services.title: Botox Treatments
services.description: Personalized wrinkle-relaxing treatments designed to create natural-looking results.

services.title: CoolSculpting Elite
services.description: Non-invasive fat-reduction technology that contours the body without surgery or downtime.

services.title: HydraFacials
services.description: A hydrating, multi-step facial that cleanses, exfoliates, and infuses the skin with nourishing serums for an instant glow.

services.title: Juvéderm
services.description: Smooth, hyaluronic acid-based filler that restores volume and softens lines for natural-looking results.

services.title: Laser Hair Removal
services.description: Long-lasting hair reduction using advanced laser technology, tailored to every skin type.

services.title: Microneedling & RF Microneedling
services.description: Collagen-stimulating microneedling, with an optional radiofrequency boost, to refine texture and tighten skin.

benefits: Every treatment is performed by an experienced, dedicated nurse injector, not a rotating roster of technicians.
A natural-first philosophy focused on subtle, camera-ready enhancement.
Personalized consultations that map your goals before a single injection is placed.
A private, boutique studio setting in the heart of Scottsdale.
Clients return to the same trusted injector visit after visit for consistent, reliable results.

testimonials.name: Nat Victorial
testimonials.quote: I only trust Kim to touch my face with injections. She's a true artist and the most talented at what she does! She's been my nurse injector for 3 years and she has never steered me in the wrong direction! I listen to her and have never been disappointed! Love her always!

testimonials.name: Rebeka Calhoun
testimonials.quote: Totally love Kim and her amazing work! She's very courteous and professional. I appreciate her expert medical knowledge and how she utilizes it with her clients. Makes me feel like I've received a thorough consult and treatment session. She's truly an artist! She keeps the ladies looking picture perfect!

faq.question: Do I need a consultation before booking a treatment?
faq.answer: Yes. Every new client begins with a personalized consultation so your injector can understand your goals and map out the right treatment plan for your features.

faq.question: Is there any downtime after injectable treatments?
faq.answer: Most clients return to normal activities the same day. Some mild swelling or bruising at injection sites can occur and typically resolves within a few days.

faq.question: How long do Botox and filler results last?
faq.answer: Botox typically lasts 3-4 months, while dermal and lip fillers can last anywhere from 6-18 months depending on the product and treatment area.

faq.question: Will my results look natural?
faq.answer: Yes. Every treatment is approached with a natural-first philosophy, using conservative, precise placement to enhance your features rather than change them.
